disclaimer: Extracts potential DESi self-improvement candidates from the v27 research corpus, types and provenance-anchors each, and screens them: any candidate naming the protected core (replay kernel, determinism scanner, concept gates, authority filters, governance core, regression integrity, safety invariants) is detected as UNSAFE and contained. This is evaluation only - nothing is applied, branches are isolated, and human approval is mandatory. Deterministic and replay-stable.
